name: Build Log — Ambient Advantage
description: Behind-the-scenes catalogue of how the Ambient Advantage system itself is built — architecture, components, decisions, gotchas, and operational notes from running a production AI pipeline. Authored by Chiel Hendriks (Managing Director, PwC Canada).

endpoints.name: Posts catalogue (JSON)
endpoints.description: Build Log post catalogue — slug, title, tags, date, read time, excerpt. Sorted newest-first.

endpoints.name: LLM/agent guide
endpoints.description: Site overview, posts, tag pages, and pointers.
